full_text: Today, the people of Taiwan have spoken. My congratulations to the President-elect @ChingteLai and Vice President-elect @bikhim Hsiao on wining the election, I look forward to working closely with the Lai-Hsiao administration to deliver for the Taiwanese people.

True peace comes from strength, not from signing a piece of paper.
Yielding to an aggressor or surrendering will never bring peace.

Standing firm against the CCP’s threats to defend democracy and freedom is not provocation — investing in defense is investing in peace.
RT @josephwutw: #China has taken lawfare & cross-border repression to a new level. It launched criminal probe against #Taiwan’s lawmaker @P…

This piece gets it all wrong. Taiwan isn’t provoking anyone. Maybe start calling out the CCP for all its live-fire drills and bullying instead.

Taiwan will only stand firmer in defending our freedom and democracy as the CCP’s aggression intensifies.

https://t.co/Qwohrl7Bkk https://t.co/XVzmGMXRUx

🇯🇵🤝🇹🇼
高市早苗氏 @takaichi_sanae の日本国首相就任を心よりお祝い申し上げます。
日本の新たなリーダーシップのもとで、台日両国が経済、安全保障などの分野でさらに緊密に協力し、自由で開かれたインド太平洋の実現に向けて共に歩むことを期待しています。
#台湾 #日本 #台日友好 https://t.co/uMkPn8S09Z

Great to catch up with Ambassador @Gustavoleitepy at the Paraguaya Embassy in D.C., together with Legislator @pumashen and Ambassador Yui! 

It’s been months since Ambassador Leite visited me in Taiwan, so glad to see my friend again, this time on the other side of the world!

At last week’s Warsaw Security Forum, Lt. Gen. Hsieh Jih-sheng from Taiwan attended in full military uniform — a significant breakthrough highlighting closer growing cooperation in regional defense and democratic resilience.

https://t.co/067jBFHZMl

高市早苗氏 @takaichi_sanae、自民党新総裁ご当選、心よりお祝い申し上げます。 安倍元首相の遺志を継ぐ卓越したリーダーシップで、台日友好を更に新たな高みへと導いてくださることを期待しています。  

最高のニュースです！ またすぐに一緒にお茶を飲める日を楽しみにしています。 
#台日友好 https://t.co/oeI4ZMLKQD

RT @josephwutw: Alex Yui, #Taiwan’s ambassador to the #US. Feel free to call him Alexander the Great. 👍

#China must not repeat #Russia’s m…

Great to meet with my friend @YatesComms , a long-time supporter of Taiwan, and to have dinner with @BuckSexton , a leading voice in American conservative media.

Great talks that bring Taiwan and the U.S. closer together! https://t.co/ivAEqHJx9J
RT @josephwutw: We deeply appreciate the many international friends of Taiwan who have expressed love and condolences to the people of Hual…
Thank you my friend and the people of Israel for standing with Taiwan during this difficult time. Your support gives strength to the people of Taiwan. 🙏

Very glad to meet my good friend @BToporovsky and his outstanding colleagues! 

In July, he initiated and passed a historic resolution in the Israeli Knesset supporting Taiwan’s international participation—the first of its kind. 

Looking forward to advancing cooperation! https://t.co/0fnE5TBAHw

In memory of Charlie Kirk, we honor his life and the impact he made on many. 

His passing reminds us of the values of service and dedication, the vital importance of free speech, and our shared duty to condemn violence in all its forms.

https://t.co/bdVxoxw06F

The CCP’s United Front is becoming an increasingly severe global threat. They exploit the freedoms of the democratic world to erode democracy from within. 

The world must stay vigilant against these schemes.
RT @WhiteHouse: On the 24th anniversary of 9/11, we honor the lives lost, the heroes who emerged, and the resilience of the American spirit…

At the House of Representatives building in Tokyo, I met with MP @takaichi_sanae and General Iwasaki Shigeru. Old friends reunited, we dove deep into the issues we care about—so much so that time simply slipped away. https://t.co/BUn9A6wE75
Had a very meaningful exchange this morning in Tokyo with House of Representatives Member @YAMASHITA_OK ! https://t.co/O8QRfjCJef

Deeply saddened by the loss of Major Maciej “Slab” Krakowian. Our thoughts and prayers are with his family and the people of Poland during this difficult time. May his courage and service always be remembered.

Rest in peace, soldier.

@TaiwaninPoland 

https://t.co/aXzl72Ecyd

Congratulations to my dear friend @Gustavoleitepy on his appointment as Paraguay’s Ambassador to the United States! I look forward to even closer cooperation between Paraguay and Taiwan—across all fields and especially through our shared efforts in Washington, D.C.

Celebrating Singapore’s 60th National Day tonight!

Wishing Singapore prosperity & Taiwan–Singapore friendship everlasting. Thank you Representative Mr. Yip Wei Kiat, my dear friend, for your great contributions. https://t.co/QZkr4A2SAI
RT @washingtonpost: A China Coast Guard ship barreled into a Chinese navy destroyer on Monday as the two vessels chased a Philippine coast…

“If we have to fight, as we have done in the past, Australia and the UK are nations that will fight together” said UK Defence Secretary John Healey.

“We secure peace through strength, and our strength comes from our allies.”
RT @josephwutw: Taiwan will hold recall elections this Saturday – an exercise of democracy enshrined by our constitution. Unfortunately, #C…

A big thank you to @RepYoungKim for speaking up for Taiwan and for all your efforts!

We truly appreciate your strong support🙏

Thank you for the overwhelming support. 
Taiwan will stand united with our friends to safeguard peace and stability in the region.

We sincerely thank our friends in the U.S.  for their overwhelming support.

Taiwan will continue to strengthen our self-defense and work with like-minded partners to safeguard peace and stability in the Indo-Pacific.

Big news! 🚀

Taiwan and the U.S. are exploring a spaceport partnership — suborbital flights between Pingtung and Houston could take just 2.5 hours! That’s 8,000 miles apart!

This marks another major milestone in Taiwan–U.S. tech cooperation.

https://t.co/LN8yAi9UrF https://t.co/nI3FnwjR0s

The Han Kuang exercise may have ended, but we never stop training and preparing.

From mountains to coasts, in cities and in the mud, our warriors overcame every challenge thrown their way.

We salute every service member safeguarding our freedom and homeland.

RT @mna_roc: 第一作戰區14日清晨實施「要域火殲實彈射擊」，狀況模擬敵軍對澎湖地區「快速突擊上陸」，各部隊依據想定及輔助狀況發布，隨即展開應變制變作爲，對來犯之敵發起攻擊。

#HanKuangExercise #Army #M60A3 #CM21 #Militar…
Taiwan’s M1A2T tanks conduct their first live-fire exercise — a powerful milestone!

Delighted to welcome friends from Lithuania’s parliament yesterday at the Legislative Yuan. We had a warm reunion and meaningful talks on Taiwan-Lithuania trade and industry ties. https://t.co/jIaOJ1x8Zc

Three days down. We move forward.

安倍晋三元首相が亡くなられて今日で3年が経ちます。彼の台湾に対する真摯な姿勢と、自由で開かれたインド太平洋地域への壮大なビジョンを私たちは決し…
RT @bikhim: Congratulations  🎆 🎉 to the American people on your 249th Independence Day! I was glad to join AIT’s Director Greene in a baseb…

Another great day! Honored to host chiefs of staff from Capitol Hill at the LY to discuss Taiwan-U.S. trade and security. Congressional staffers play a key role in shaping policy — their professionalism and influence are crucial.

Ongoing exchanges strengthen partnership! https://t.co/bNLooKd2k1

Had a great time today hosting a group of talented young staffers from the U.S. Capitol Hill at our Legislative Yuan. We had a lively and inspiring exchange of ideas — a true meeting of minds across the Pacific! https://t.co/bjBNvT56D0
RT @BToporovsky: The report about Chinese surveillance on Taiwanese Vice President @bikhim during her visit to Prague is deeply disturbing.…

RT @ipacglobal: 📢 STATEMENT ON PLANNED ATTACK AGAINST TAIWANESE VICE-PRESIDENT ELECT IN PRAGUE 📢

"The plan, if successful, would have cons…

China’s diplomats in Prague trailed and endangered then Taiwan VP-elect, now VP Hsiao @bikhim during her visit to Czechia, confirmed by Czech intelligence.

CCP’s blatant breach of international norms must be condemned and has no place in any democracy.

https://t.co/sfr0OckMXb

Kudos to the UK’s Royal Navy — with HMS Spey’s transit through the Taiwan Strait on June 18, they’ve once again taken concrete action to uphold freedom of navigation and reaffirm the Strait as international waters!

 https://t.co/FdYNpugDAL

Well done! After years of dedication and hard work by many personnel and the Navy, our home-built submarine Hai Kun (Narwhal) has completed its first-ever Sea Acceptance Test (SAT)!

This is not only a major milestone but also a symbol of our determination to defend Taiwan! https://t.co/Ct4PTDI6Ui

Taiwan’s first Indigenous Defense Submarine, Narwhal (Haikun), is now conducting harbor trials using its own propulsion system—marking steady progress toward the long-awaited Sea Acceptance Test (SAT).

A major milestone on our path to defense self-reliance!

Source: FB IDF經國號 https://t.co/MZMNBHLLgA

Taiwan’s Defense Minister Koo warns of China’s “expansionist agenda” as two PLA carriers cross the First and Second Island Chains.

Beijing’s rapid military buildup and growing ambition pose serious challenges to regional peace and stability.

https://t.co/iSwHfX1IGZ
RT @DPPonline: DPP Chairperson @ChingteLai's statement on Hong Kong: https://t.co/Z6G9IRJSJp

Honored to welcome the first-ever FAPA Emerging Leaders Workshop held in Taiwan! These outstanding young professionals have served in the U.S. Congress, DoD, UN, and leading think tanks — even retired officers among them. 

A great discussion at the Legislative Yuan! https://t.co/YEpjwGfeYQ

Thank you UK for standing up for peace and stability in the Taiwan Strait!

Taiwan and the UK share democratic values and a commitment to cross-strait peace.

We’ll keep working with like-minded democracies to advance peace and stability in the Indo-Pacific and beyond.

China’s rapidly growing military power and ambitions have become a serious threat to peace and stability in the region. @SecDef @PeteHegseth warns that China’s threat to Taiwan is imminent, any invasion would have devastating consequences for the world.

https://t.co/3SGkSfzv5U

Facing the PLA’s rapidly escalating threats, we are determined to strengthen Taiwan’s self-defense by enhancing asymmetric capabilities and expanding joint training with allies. 

Despite challenges, President Lai and the DPP gov remain firmly committed.

https://t.co/rDrIskIq18

What a wonderful week! Grateful for the visit from our friends from Israel and for the great exchanges with staff from both the U.S. Senate and House.

Strengthening friendships and cooperation across borders! https://t.co/koJGHndAl7

China’s military drills near Taiwan aren’t just exercises—they’re rehearsals for invasion. Adm. Paparo has made that clear. The threat is real, and effective deterrence begins with recognizing that danger.

Taiwan will not yield in the face of threats.

 https://t.co/AU6CDMtsOr

We are deeply saddened by the passing of Congressman @GerryConnolly, a staunch friend of Taiwan and former Co-Chair of the Congressional Taiwan Caucus. His unwavering support for democracy and the U.S.-Taiwan partnership will never be forgotten. Our heartfelt condolences.

Thank you to Australia and all the like-minded partners for reaffirming support for Taiwan’s meaningful participation in the WHO and WHA. Health is a universal right — Taiwan’s contributions should not be excluded.
We are saddened to hear about President @JoeBiden ‘ s recent medical diagnosis. We extend our warm and best wishes to his family. Wishing President Biden a swift and full recovery. 🙏

Retired U.S. Rear Adm. Montgomery confirms 500 U.S. troops in Taiwan for joint training, urges expansion to 1,000 to boost real combat readiness. 

National defense has no party lines—security is everyone’s priority.

 https://t.co/za2IDTeyEP

China’s military ambitions toward Taiwan remain relentless. Their so-called “drills” are thinly veiled political propaganda, aiming to intimidate and destabilize. Yet, Taiwan stands firm. We will continue to bolster our defense capabilities, ensuring our democracy remains secure.

RT @lukedepulford: #NEW

@iingwen former President of Taiwan addresses parliamentarians of both Houses of Parliament. 🇹🇼🇬🇧 https://t.co/URu…

Sincere congratulations to the Holy See on the election of His Holiness Pope Leo XIV. May his papacy be guided by wisdom, compassion, and a steadfast commitment to peace, as he leads the faithful and serves as a shepherd to the world.

We strongly condemn the KMT’s inappropriate and offensive remarks. Equating a democracy with past horrific atrocities is not only historically ignorant—it is deeply disrespectful to the victims of those crimes.

He does not speak for the people of Taiwan. https://t.co/kZLcyYs0yc

Big thank you to the US House for unanimously passing the Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act and Taiwan International Solidarity Act—a strong bipartisan stand with #Taiwan. These acts push back against China’s misuse of UN Resolution 2758 and support Taiwan’s global engagement.

Congratulations to Singapore on the successful completion of its 2025 General Election!

Warmest congratulations to the People’s Action Party and Prime Minister @LawrenceWongST on this important achievement. Wishing continued success and prosperity to the people of Singapore!

A fulfilling and pleasant day in D.C.! From the train to Capitol Hill, we met with Sen. @TimSheehyMT , Sen. @SenatorLankford , Rep. @MarioDB &  @RepBera . Great exchanges on Taiwan’s security, trade, arms sales & tax issues—thankful for the warm and constructive dialogues! https://t.co/VlvOq7DXdQ

Just landed at JFK after a 14-hour flight! 

Gonna get some rest and then catch a train to DC tomorrow morning. https://t.co/CgHZ0GBbZq

About to head to the U.S. with a multi-party delegation from the Legislative Yuan USA Caucus and the Foreign & National Defense Committee. 

Proud to lead this team as we work to deepen Taiwan-U.S. ties and show a united front for Taiwan’s interests! https://t.co/ykJtHr2tdW

At the UNSC, U.S. diplomat Ting Wu called out China “言行不一、說一套做一套”—not only for saying one thing and doing another, but for deliberately twisting Resolution 2758 to isolate Taiwan.

Big thank you to the U.S. for standing with Taiwan.

https://t.co/wZZpxUcQUS https://t.co/z3nvalLnu3

The Philippines has lifted decades-old restrictions on visits to Taiwan by officials—a major step that paves the way for closer cooperation on regional peace and stability. A significant move in the evolving Indo-Pacific geopolitical landscape. https://t.co/HCCEdHEuNC

I had an in-depth two-hour discussion at the Legislative Yuan’s National Defense Committee with senior staffers from the U.S. Senate and House Armed Services, Intelligence, and Defense Appropriations Subcommittees.

Grateful for this meaningful exchange on security cooperation. https://t.co/Idbt4DaLAi

The Holy See is Taiwan’s long-time ally and our only official diplomatic partner in Europe. We offer our heartfelt condolences to Pope Francis. May the Pope rest in peace and his legacy continue to inspire compassion and faith around the world.

A big thank you to our friends at @ipacglobal and @2eKamertweets in the #Netherlands  for standing with #Taiwan ! Your strong support—backing WHO observer status, trade ties, high-level visits, and opposing military coercion—means so much to democracy and the people of Taiwan.

A young KMT party worker, suspected of document forgery and electoral fraud in a recall election, showed up to the DA’s office wearing a Nazi symbol. As Taiwanese, we strongly condemn both his criminal actions and his ignorance of history. https://t.co/4dihkb7Tkg

Well, China claims it’s not a bully, yet just days ago conducted live-fire drills around Taiwan. Perhaps its understanding of bullying differs from that of democratic nations—making it a consistent troublemaker in the Indo-Pacific.

#SharingDoesNotEqualEndorsement

USTR Greer has announced that detailed tariff discussions with Taiwan and Israel will take place tonight.

Taiwan’s early readiness and clear proposals may have helped us secure a place among the first to engage in talks.

https://t.co/FPUhGQo8G4

China’s embassy says using tariffs to pressure others is “barbaric(野蛮な) bullying.”

Yet the CCP’s live-fire drills at others’ doorsteps are far more barbaric and coercive. Hypocrisy much?

Taiwan stands ready to deepen trade ties.

President @ChingteLai proposes 5 directions: from zero-tariff talks to expanding U.S. imports, investments, & resolving trade barriers.

A strong TW-US partnership will create a new golden era for both economies. 
https://t.co/7g72dZyH2u
